creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sun Aug 19 22:44:08 2012
New Revision: 302770
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302770

Log:
  - Update to 2.0.2
  - Remove proc.c patch as it has been fixed upstream (ZBX-3897)
  - Add build dependency to pkgconfig
  
  PR:		ports/170700
  Submitted by:	Pakhom <pakhom706@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	eadler (mentor)

Deleted:
  head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/files/patch-src_libs_zbxsysinfo_freebsd__proc.c
Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/distinfo

Modified: head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/Makefile	Sun Aug 19 21:47:45 2012	(r302769)
+++ head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/Makefile	Sun Aug 19 22:44:08 2012	(r302770)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	zabbix2
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.2
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/zabbix/ZABBIX%20Latest%20Stable/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMESUFFIX?=	-server
@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ USE_RC_SUBR=	zabbix_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d
 .endif
 
 USE_ICONV=	yes
+USE_PKGCONFIG=	build
 
 USERS=		zabbix
 GROUPS=		zabbix

Modified: head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/distinfo	Sun Aug 19 21:47:45 2012	(r302769)
+++ head/net-mgmt/zabbix2-server/distinfo	Sun Aug 19 22:44:08 2012	(r302770)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (zabbix-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 52cc4b8a8624d53ff4591ebf86a92c19230964d46d39e5cccf7b8648fb2ecf4d
-SIZE (zabbix-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 12091622
+SHA256 (zabbix-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 2db56e4fc291f5469584844703f6815fe739c3b33b4c2d5854285a780650cfbb
+SIZE (zabbix-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 12070505
